metadata.name: Inquire About Becoming a Foster Parent

description: A citizen is interested in becoming a foster parent and is calling for information.

nodes.task_description: Provide information on the basic requirements to become a foster parent.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the eligibility criteria (e.g., age, background check).

nodes.task_description: Explain the application and training process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent outlines the steps involved, from application to certification.

nodes.task_description: Sign the caller up for an upcoming information session.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully registers the caller for an info session.
